name: Pork Chops and Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sliced green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the water to a boil (add more water if needed). Stir in rice and boil for 20 minutes.
2. In a skillet, cook bacon until crisp. Remove bacon and crumble, reserving 2 tbsp drippings. Set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine eggs and 2 tbsp water. Cook eggs in the reserved drippings in the skillet. Add drained rice, bacon, onion, and 3 tbsp soy sauce to the eggs; mix well. Turn into a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole.
4. In a skillet, brown the chops in 1 tbsp drippings. Arrange chops atop the rice mixture; brush with additional soy sauce. Bake, tightly covered, at 350 degrees for about 40 minutes or until chops are tender.
